title: Tbestmax 4 Pack Qtip Holder Dispenser Cotton Ball, Cotton Swab, Floss - 12oz, 10 oz Clear Plastic Apothecary Jars for Bathroom Organizer and Storage Containers (Brown Wood Lids)
description:
About this item
Size - 12oz: With the lid, height = 4.2 inches, diameter = 3 inches Without lid: about 3.6 high, 10oz: With the lid, height = 4.1 inches, diameter = 2.7 inches Without lid: about 3.5 high
2 pack 10-ounce, 2 pack 12-ounce perfect for Q-tips, cotton pad, cotton balls, cotton rounds,and makeup brush,or any other bathroom necessities and accessories
Q tip Storage Organizer - Look like glass but are a really sturdy plastic and will not shatter, safe for kids
Each qtip dispenser jars has a removable lid and a wide mouth, easy to get them out
These canisters are great looking and perfect for the vanity, bathroom and kitchen
reviews_5s: These were smaller than I thought, but I didn't measure so that my fault. They're plastic and cute, perfect for the kids bathroom.These "jars" are perfect and fit flossing plackers and/or Q-tips perfectly on the shelf. They seem sturdy and they are absolutely CLEAR so you can see what's in them. Small size but roomy enough for the toiletry items I mentioned previously. Jar lid doesn't fit tightly, but that doesn't matter to me... I don't want to have to take the "jar" down in order to open it. But the lid fits flat and they are the perfect size. No problem with them so far and I've had them for more than a month already.Love it. Got the bathroom tray separate luckily came in same wood colorI had bigger containers for qtips and cotton rounds in our medicine cabinet, and my husband kept knocking them off the shelf. I was looking for something simple, sturdy on its base, and that would compactly store those daily used items. I also didn't want to go for glass - plastic is easier to replace and clean up if my husband drops one of these in the future. This set perfectly fits the bill for what I wanted, and they look very nice to boot! The lids are easy to lift off and nicely slot back into place. They fit a decent amount of both items as you can see. It's a perfect fit for the cotton rounds, but they're still easy to get out of the container.Makes my bathroom look elegant. It’s a little more lighter than the picture but I don’t mindWorks perfect for what I need them for!I really like these jars! I used them for disposable items like nose plugs and hair ties, in my studio space! They fit perfectly, are easy to open, and help with organization! One of the lid topper pieces that you grab onto did fall off in transit, but I was able to glue it back on and it’s been durable ever since! :) 10/10great value for the price! Love using this in my bathroom for organization. Would recommendExactly what I looking for. Sturdy and holds my everyday products!These look really cute sitting on my white shelves in my bathroom. I’m glad I bought them.
reviews_1s:
Much smaller than I realized. The lids are very cheaply made and one of the lids did not fit the jar correctly. We had to file it down to get it to fit. They’ll do the trick for now but I definitely would not buy these particular jars again.I guess it’s true, you get what you pay for. Very thin plastic and the lids are not tight fitting. I would return but we are having guests come for the weekend and I needed for our guest bathroom.After delaying in shipping, I get this And very disappointed . This product came with lids broke. One knob in bottom of jar and one knob missing completely. These jars are teeny tiny. The are cute but not very practical . The pictures are deceiving, so definitely pay attention to the dimensions that are shown in the ad and look at a tape measure.
The Q-tips will not even fit in the small jar without crushing them when you put the lid on. So these are so going back!! So I would consider purchasing others if I were you.Containers were much smaller than anticipated. Had to returnDo not use these. Paper thin lids and plastic. Absolutely terrible. Not sure why this has such high reviews.I thought I read the dimensions and they seemed reasonable, but upon receipt of the product, it was just too little to meet my needs.I ordered this and when I saw the box it came in I knew immediately it was too small. I opened the box and the containers were very small…definitely for for small spaces. I returned it and ordered something else size appropriate for my space.These are made of that cheap, thin, brittle plastic. The lid has the shortest lip possible on it, so you have to set it on top of the jar very precisely in order for the lip to fit inside the edge. What a shame. The manufacturer that made these probably could have poured just a few more cents into the manufacturing process and made a more solid, longer-lasting product. Instead, this has "disposable" written all over it. I'm betting I'll have a crack in the plastic (from normal use) within a week.Very cheap product, one of the larger containers got stuck and won’t even open anymore so I had to throw it away. Edit to add, two containers got stuck and wouldn’t open. This was the worst product I’ve ever purchased in my life.Picture looked like the size kitchen canisters. Should have paid more attention to the size. Quite pricey for the teeny tiny size. Does fit about a dozen q-tips in one canister.
